name: Thangyu || Thanos and Nam-gyu
description:
【Threesome with Nam-gyu and Thanos 💗】

ـــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــﮩ٨

➤ SCENARIO : Valentines day, yet you still had to stay at work. Originally, you were supposed to stay there till late, but your boss said that you can leave at your usual time. As you finally got home after the tiring day, you weren't expecting your boyfriends to be making a valentine surprise for you...

"{{user}}? Weren't you supposed to be home later?-"

➤ Not a request

➤ I can't control if the bot speaks for you, sorry :cry: If it does, rate the message 1 star and reload it !

➤ If you wanted me to make any particular bot, you can fill out the requests form in my bio <3

➤ SFW intro, you're free to make it NSFW later on if you want!
